execution_order.note: Every lead emailed 2026-05-12 is a LinkedIn candidate. Full name, business name, town, signal, sector required. If records unavailable: use search_queries[] below (sector discovery entries) — they will find the right profiles via sector+town approach.

execution_order.action: IMAP sweep — ALL Batch 5 leads (NOT leads 1/3/22). Per lead, not bulk.
execution_order.note: FIRST. Before any LinkedIn search. If NOT_INTERESTED: block LinkedIn permanently, cancel Day-7 send. If UNSUBSCRIBE: suppress all channels within 24h (GDPR Article 21). If INTERESTED: LinkedIn still valid — proceed, do NOT reference email. If OOO: LinkedIn valid — note return date.

execution_order.action: Execute LinkedIn searches using search_queries[] below
execution_order.note: If you have confirmed lead names from 2026-05-12: replace with name-specific primary queries. If name unknown: use sector_discovery entries as-is. Sector priority order: Solicitors → Estate agents → Accountants → Hotels/B&Bs → Restaurants → Boutique retail → Trades.

execution_order.action: Check posts from last 60 days on EVERY confirmed profile BEFORE drafting note
execution_order.note: Post-reference note has 3-4x higher acceptance. Do not skip. Takes 2 minutes per profile.

execution_order.action: Send connection request + note — use monday_fallback_notes in linkedin_connection_notes.json
execution_order.note: 200-char HARD limit. Count in plain-text editor before sending. Do NOT mention email, SSL, 'Not Secure', mobile, website audit, or any prior contact.

execution_order.action: Write data/linkedin_profiles.json — ONE ENTRY PER LEAD, IMMEDIATELY AFTER EACH SEARCH
execution_order.note: MANDATORY. Do not batch. Write each entry as you go, whether or not a profile was found. This is the ONLY confirmation mechanism. Without this file: archive trigger fires Tuesday EOD for EVERY Batch 5 lead.

execution_order.action: CHANGELOG.md — 50+ days overdue. Mandatory before tomorrow's Day-7 sends.
execution_order.note: Log: all Batch 5 Day-0 sends, Day-3 bumps, LinkedIn outcomes, IMAP results since April, archive decisions (leads 1/3/22, 49/51/53/54). Absolute deadline today.

search_queries.name: CONFIRM_FROM_2026-05-12_RECORDS
search_queries.google_query: site:linkedin.com/in solicitor "Malton" "North Yorkshire" (director OR partner OR owner)
search_queries.note: Highest priority in Ryedale. Malton solicitors are almost always on LinkedIn. Check posts from last 60 days — legal updates, charity, local events. Post-reference very likely. REPLACE with name-specific query if you have the full name from 2026-05-12 records.

search_queries.name: CONFIRM_FROM_2026-05-12_RECORDS
search_queries.google_query: site:linkedin.com/in "estate agent" "Malton" "North Yorkshire" (director OR owner OR manager)
search_queries.note: Estate agents in Malton post market updates and sold listings. High post-reference opportunity.

search_queries.name: CONFIRM_FROM_2026-05-12_RECORDS
search_queries.google_query: site:linkedin.com/in accountant "Malton" "North Yorkshire" (director OR partner OR owner)
search_queries.note: High LinkedIn presence. Post frequently about tax deadlines, Making Tax Digital, self-assessment. Good post-reference likelihood.

search_queries.name: CONFIRM_FROM_2026-05-12_RECORDS
search_queries.google_query: site:linkedin.com/in "Malton" "North Yorkshire" retail (owner OR director OR founder)
search_queries.fallback_query_1: site:linkedin.com/in "Malton" food OR shop OR boutique owner founder
search_queries.note: Malton has a strong independent food and retail scene. Food Festival presence often generates posts.

search_queries.name: CONFIRM_FROM_2026-05-12_RECORDS
search_queries.google_query: site:linkedin.com/in hotel "Helmsley" "North Yorkshire" (owner OR director OR manager)
search_queries.note: HIGHEST post-reference likelihood in the entire Ryedale batch. Helmsley hospitality owners post about seasonal events, North York Moors, local walks. ALWAYS check posts before using generic note.

search_queries.name: CONFIRM_FROM_2026-05-12_RECORDS
search_queries.company: restaurant or fine dining, Helmsley area
search_queries.google_query: site:linkedin.com/in restaurant "Helmsley" (owner OR chef OR director)
search_queries.fallback_query_1: site:linkedin.com/in "Helmsley" OR "Harome" "North Yorkshire" restaurant chef founder
search_queries.note: Fine dining in Helmsley and Harome area. Owners post menus, seasonal ingredients, supplier stories, awards. Post-reference very likely.

search_queries.name: CONFIRM_FROM_2026-05-12_RECORDS
search_queries.note: Helmsley estate agents cover the wider Ryedale rural market — active LinkedIn presences. Ryedale rural property generates consistent posting.

search_queries.name: CONFIRM_FROM_2026-05-12_RECORDS
search_queries.google_query: site:linkedin.com/in (hotel OR "B&B" OR "bed and breakfast") "Pickering" "North Yorkshire" (owner OR director)
search_queries.note: Pickering is a gateway to the North York Moors and the North Yorkshire Moors Railway. B&B and hotel owners post about tourism, steam railway, seasonal offers.

search_queries.name: CONFIRM_FROM_2026-05-12_RECORDS
search_queries.google_query: site:linkedin.com/in "estate agent" "Pickering" (director OR owner OR manager)
search_queries.note: Medium LinkedIn presence. Rural property market generates some posting activity.

search_queries.name: CONFIRM_FROM_2026-05-12_RECORDS
search_queries.note: Modest LinkedIn presence for Pickering restaurants. Generic note if profile found with no recent posts.

search_queries.name: CONFIRM_FROM_2026-05-12_RECORDS
search_queries.google_query: site:linkedin.com/in "Kirkbymoorside" "North Yorkshire" (solicitor OR accountant OR estate agent) (owner OR director OR partner)
search_queries.note: Try BOTH spellings — 'Kirkbymoorside' and 'Kirbymoorside' both appear in LinkedIn profiles. Small town — cast a slightly wider net. Also try the abbreviated 'KbM' form some locals use.

search_queries.name: CONFIRM_FROM_2026-05-12_RECORDS
search_queries.google_query: site:linkedin.com/in "Kirkbymoorside" (hotel OR retail OR restaurant) owner director
search_queries.note: Small market town. LinkedIn presence is modest. Generic note if profile found.

search_queries.name: CONFIRM_FROM_2026-05-12_RECORDS
search_queries.google_query: site:linkedin.com/in "Norton" "Malton" (solicitor OR accountant OR estate agent OR builder) (owner OR director OR partner)
search_queries.note: Norton is effectively part of the Malton market area. Use 'Norton' 'Malton' in queries — the full 'Norton-on-Derwent' rarely appears in LinkedIn profiles.

search_queries.name: CONFIRM_FROM_2026-05-12_RECORDS
search_queries.google_query: site:linkedin.com/in "Hovingham" "North Yorkshire" (owner OR director OR manager)
search_queries.note: Very small village. LinkedIn presence is LOW. The Worsley Arms Hotel is the primary hospitality lead — search specifically if in your send list. Generic note only — post-reference unlikely. Do NOT send if profile cannot be confirmed as owner.

linkedin_profiles_json_instruction.critical: Write this file TODAY Monday 2026-05-18, same session as LinkedIn execution. This is the only confirmation mechanism. Archive trigger fires Tuesday EOD for any lead without an entry showing note_sent: true.
linkedin_profiles_json_instruction.write_after_each_search: Do not batch — write one entry immediately after each search, whether or not a profile was found.

entry_schema.lead_id: [from send records — use BATCH5_TOWN_SECTOR_NN if ID unknown]
entry_schema.name: [owner name as on LinkedIn profile]
entry_schema.note_text: [exact text sent, character-counted, or null if skipped]

archive_trigger.condition: Any Batch 5 lead where linkedin_profiles.json entry shows note_sent: false OR entry is missing entirely
archive_trigger.action: Archive immediately as LOST_NO_RESPONSE. Log CHANGELOG same session. No deferral, no extension.
archive_trigger.consequence: Same outcome as warm pipeline (leads 1/3/22) — £800-1,175 written off and permanently unrecoverable.
archive_trigger.post_archive_next_steps: If archive fires tonight: update leads to LOST_NO_RESPONSE, log CHANGELOG, include in Day-7 results analysis. Batch 6 decision remains on Wednesday based on Day-7 reply count.

rules: IMAP per lead before note — mandatory. NOT leads 1/3/22.
No LinkedIn to leads 1/3/22/2/7/19/49/51/53/54 — permanently blocked
200-character hard limit on every note — count in plain text editor
Do NOT reference the email sequence, SSL, mobile, audit findings, or 'Not Secure' in any note
Do NOT start a note with 'I'
If owner surname NOT confirmed: skip LinkedIn for that lead. Never guess a profile. Log as SURNAME_UNKNOWN in profiles.json.
Write profiles.json entry after EVERY search — not just confirmed profiles
No LinkedIn on weekends — today Monday is valid

non_candidates.reason: NOT_INTERESTED reply. All channels permanently blocked.
LOST_UNRESOLVED — archived. No email contact ever made.
